value.found_quote: This notebook builds an improvement flywheel for an agent. We start with real traces, add human and model feedback, turn that feedback into evals, and use the resulting evidence to propose the next harness changes for Codex to implement.
value.rationale: The page is an OpenAI Cookbook example describing how to build an agent improvement loop using traces, evals, and observability. The navigation lists "Evals" (Getting started, Working with evals, Graders, etc.) and "Integrations and observability" under the Agents SDK, and the notebook body explicitly describes generating evals and using traces/observability. This substantiates that OpenAI offers evals and observability capabilities.
